nasb.text: He fell asleep and dreamed a second time; and behold, seven ears of grain came up on a single stalk, plump and good.

esv.text: And he fell asleep and dreamed a second time. And behold, seven ears of grain, plump and good, were growing on one stalk.

cnv.text: 他又睡著，作了第二個夢，夢見一根麥莖，長出七個麥穗，又肥壯又美好。

ccb.text: 之后，他又睡着了，又做了个梦。他梦见一株麦子上长了七个饱满的穗子。

csbs.text: 然后他又睡着，做了第二个梦。看哪！有七个丰硕美好的穗子在一根秆上长起来。
